note: OpenAPI 3 YAML, verified with python3 yaml.safe_load. Used by sux/src/fns/vault*.ts (obsidian-local-rest-api plugin).
Official spec from exa-labs/openapi-spec GitHub repo (default branch is 'master', not 'main'). docs.exa.ai/reference/openapi-spec itself is a JS-rendered page, not raw.

Official CoinGecko demo/public API OAS from coingecko/coingecko-api-oas GitHub repo (also contains pro-api.json for the paid tier, not vendored). docs.coingecko.com/openapi is a JS-rendered Next.js page, not a raw spec URL.
ClinicalTrials.gov REST API v2, OpenAPI 3.0.3 YAML served directly (despite the .../oas/v2 path with no extension).
Google API Discovery Document (Google's own format, not OpenAPI) for Places API (New) v1.
Google API Discovery Document for YouTube Data API v3.
Swagger 2.0 spec for the Graph API, served directly at /graph/v1/swagger.json (the /api-docs/graph URL is the human Swagger-UI page).
~12.1 MB (Content-Length header), over the 2MB vendoring cap. Not downloaded; refetch on demand from github/rest-api-description.
~10.3 MB (Content-Length header), over the 2MB cap. A yaml variant (openapi.yaml, ~24MB) also exists in the same repo. Not downloaded.
Official OpenAPI 3 spec exists at this URL but developer.ebay.com returns HTTP 403 (bot/UA detection) to curl; needs a browser session or API key to fetch. No public GitHub mirror found.
Prose docs only (Search API + MCP pages); no OpenAPI/Postman spec published by Kagi.
The dashboard 'exposes the spec' only inside the authenticated developer dashboard UI; no public static openapi.json found (guessed /openapi.json returned the dashboard SPA shell, not a spec).
sux calls the undocumented /html endpoint; no official API or spec exists.
No official SERP API (scrape-based). The CSE alternative (100/day free) has a Discovery Doc but sux does not use CSE, so not vendored.
docs.tavily.com is a JS-rendered Mintlify site; guessed static spec paths (/openapi.json, /api-reference/openapi.json) all 404. No public GitHub mirror found.
Legacy Atom/XML API, prose docs only, no OpenAPI.
E-utilities, prose docs only, no OpenAPI.

The 'Swagger UI' page name is misleading: the CrossRef/rest-api-doc GitHub repo contains only Markdown (api_format.md), and guessed spec endpoints (api.crossref.org/openapi.json, swagger.json) 404. No machine spec found.
Prose docs only; guessed openapi.json/yaml endpoints on api.openalex.org and in ourresearch/openalex-guts 404. Only third-party unofficial OAS mirrors exist (diverged/openalex-openapi), not vendored.
Interactive docs UI only; no OpenAPI/Swagger spec published.
Prose API docs + OAuth wiki only; no official machine spec.
Prose docs only; guessed api.tailscale.com/api/v2/openapi.json 404s. No public spec found.
Loki push API and Prometheus remote-write (Influx line protocol) are documented as prose HTTP API references, not OpenAPI.
Unofficial reverse-engineered GraphQL API; no published GraphQL schema/SDL or OpenAPI spec.
RFC-only protocol (JMAP core, RFC 8620); no OpenAPI-style spec exists for an RFC-defined JSON protocol.
RFC-only (WebDAV/CalDAV, RFC 4791), XML/WebDAV protocol, no machine spec format applies.
RFC-only (JSContact, RFC 9553), a data-model RFC, not a fetchable API spec.
Dropbox publishes its API spec as a 'Stone' IDL (.stone files), not OpenAPI/Swagger/Postman. No OpenAPI export found (guessed openapi.yaml in the repo 404s).
docs.claude.com/en/api/openapi is a JS-rendered page, not a raw spec; no publicly hosted static openapi.json/yaml found.
The bestbuyapis/api-documentation GitHub repo (Jekyll site source) contains no swagger/openapi file; developer portal has prose docs only.
Reference docs are behind the developer portal UI; guessed api.kroger.com/v1/openapi.json 404s. No public spec download found without a portal login.
Unofficial/undocumented backend, scrape-only, no public docs at all.
Availability API + CDX server API, both prose-documented, no OpenAPI.
Graph Explorer + prose docs only; no vendorable OpenAPI/Postman spec published.
No official public-scrape API; sux reads page-embedded JSON-LD, not a documented API.
